name: FrontView REIT, Inc.
business: FrontView is an internally-managed net-lease real estate investment trust that acquires, owns, and manages properties with direct frontage on high-traffic roads. These properties are net-leased to a diversified group of tenants, primarily service-oriented businesses such as restaurants, medical providers, financial institutions, and retail stores.

exposures.sentence: FrontView's tenants typically include service-oriented businesses, such as medical and dental providers, quick service restaurants, casual dining, other service providers, financial institutions, cellular stores, automotive stores, fitness operators, discount retail, convenience stores and gas stations, automotive dealers, car washes, home improvement stores, other necessity tenants, pharmacies, as well as professional services tenants.
